text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has once again rolled around, and
this year, we'll focus on training for the upcoming
Arima Kinen and autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I give Biwa Hayahide her training schedule,
she nods approvingly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible. You managed to find all this
information on the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You even included data on the Arima Kinen and Brian's predicted times for the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How much time did you spend on this? It must
have been so much work!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then for the purpose of solidifying my winning
equation, I graciously accept your support.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'll work hard for both our sakes.
